vocab.example: Wearing a watch is a subtle way to demonstrate one's commitment to punctuality in a professional setting.
Checking the time on a wristband is a distraction-free alternative to pulling out a smartphone, which often leads to aimless scrolling.

vocab.meaning: sự thanh lịch trong cách ăn mặc
vocab.example: Beyond its utility, a well-chosen timepiece adds a touch of sartorial elegance to any outfit.
Traditional mechanical watches offer unmatched reliability since they don't depend on a battery or an internet connection.
In many corporate cultures, wearing a watch is seen as a key component of a solid professional ethos.
While some view it as obsolete, I believe the practical utility of having the time instantly visible on your wrist is undeniable.

vocab.meaning: vết tích/tàn dư của quá khứ
vocab.example: Some argue that wristwatches are a mere vestige of the past, now that digital clocks are integrated into every device we own.

vocab.meaning: ý thức về sự khẩn trương/thời gian
vocab.example: Glancing at my watch throughout the day helps me maintain a sense of urgency regarding my daily goals.

vocab.meaning: giá trị về mặt tình cảm
vocab.example: Many people continue to wear watches because of the deep sentimental value attached to them as family heirlooms.
For certain professions like pilots or divers, a specialized watch remains an indispensable tool for safety.
